title: Image URL undefined due to Supabase row limit
symptom: When trying to display images, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'photo_url')'. This happens intermittently based on the data fetched from Supabase.
applies_when: Exceeding the maximum number of rows returned
not_this_if: Images display correctly on other pages
root_cause: The error occurs because the Supabase setting limits the number of rows returned from a table to prevent excessive payload sizes. When this limit is reached, the expected data for the images is not returned, leading to undefined properties.
fix_steps: Increase the maximum number of rows returned
Save the changes and test the image display again
agent_instruction: Increase the maximum number of rows returned in Supabase settings to resolve the image display issue.
